research.query: Brødrene Dahl Nordic HVAC pump distributor manufacturer
research.summary: Brødrene Dahl AS Information https://rocketreach. co/brodrene-dahl-as-profile_b5f6e4b7f42e8f68 Company Information. # Brødrene Dahl AS Information. Brødrene Dahl AS was established in Norway in 1917, and is the country's leading supplier of technical products in the fields of heating, ventilation and sanitation technology, water and sewage, and industry.

outreach_notes: 该公司为Tier1-Nordic重要目标。建议联系出口/采购负责人，强调 Farreach 的 OEM 产能优势（越南工厂月产 80 万件）和价格竞争力。
